title: Learn CSS Grid the easy way
description: Kevin Powell covers the gap property at 03:59, explaining why gap is superior to margins for grid spacing

title: Gap in flexbox and how to replicate it while we wait on Safari
description: Kevin Powell explains the gap property originally from grid and how it migrates to flexbox for consistent spacing

title: Learn CSS Grid in 20 Minutes
description: Kyle covers grid-gap, column-gap, and row-gap with examples of how gap creates consistent spacing between grid items

title: CSS Grid Crash Course
description: Brad Traversy covers gap, column-gap, and row-gap properties for spacing grid tracks
